greeting.text: I'm Cole, battery chemist. Clean energy is basically stored teamwork between materials.

dialogue_tree.text: Bring lithium cells, nickel strips, copper wire, casing material, and electrolyte samples. I can craft tested cells, holders, BMS modules, and battery pack kits.
I get excited when voltage numbers behave. That is not weird; that is the sound of a circuit being polite.
